Scenario: Verify existing Account has Billing Address and Payment Terms under Details tab
Expected Result: Billing Address and Payment Terms logged (soft-fail if absent); accountUrl contains /Account/

Scenario: Create a new Contact on the Account and capture the Contact URL
Create Opportunity from Contact Related list and verify Primary Contact Role assignment
Expected Result: Opportunity created; opportunityUrl contains /Opportunity/; Primary Contact Role visible (soft-fail)

Scenario: Create Quote from Opportunity, Browse Catalogs, select Price Book, add product, validate cart
Expected Result: Quote created; product appears in cart; quoteUrl contains /Quote/

Scenario: Accept Quote, create Contract, activate Contract, create Order from Quote and activate Order
Expected Result: Contract Activated; Order created and marked complete
